proposed_value: Payer confirmed as small-business owners/executives managing 3-10 parallel projects, based on 5 founder-conducted field interviews.
citation_excerpt: 5 of 5 interviewed managers confirmed managing 3-10 concurrent projects and expressed direct interest in a paid solution.

proposed_value: Estimated 40,000-60,000 addressable SMB managers across target GCC markets, based on licensed-company registry counts.
citation_excerpt: Licensed SME counts across UAE/KSA suggest a mid-range addressable base of 40,000-60,000 owner-operators.

proposed_value: Willingness-to-pay signal remains mixed pending a broader sample beyond the initial two interviews.
citation_excerpt: 1 of 2 managers showed immediate willingness to pay; the second stalled on a trust/privacy concern.
